title: TITLE VI/JOM INDIAN EDUCATION - 211info
text: COLUMBIA GORGE EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT TITLE VI/JOM INDIAN EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplemental educational and supportive services to eligible students. The program assists in connecting families of Native American students with culture, community, and education to successfully complete high school and pursue higher education. 400 E Scenic Drive Suite 207 The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: The student must be enrolled in school in Wasco or Hood River County. Either the student or a biological parent or grandparent must be or must have been enrolled in or recognized by an Indian tribe, group, or band Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm (541) 506-2258 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 506-2258 Jonathan Fost [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Federal 506 Form indicating the student's heritage AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the campus of Columbia Gorge Community College building 2, floor 2 Services: Alternative Education * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA GORGE EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
